title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART H. LOUISIANA DENTAL LOSS RATIOS FOR DENTAL

HEALTHCARE SERVICES PLANS ACT

§1161. Short title

            This Subpart shall be cited as the "Louisiana Dental Loss Ratios for Dental Healthcare Services Plans Act".

            Acts 2024, No. 357, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
SUBPART H.  LOUISIANA DENTAL LOSS RATIOS FOR DENTAL
HEALTHCARE SERVICES PLANS ACT
§1161.  Short title
This Subpart shall be cited as the "Louisiana Dental Loss Ratios for Dental
Healthcare Services Plans Act".
Acts 2024, No. 357, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2025.
